articles.summary: Selling AI to enterprise means getting serious about security and compliance — usually involving features like single sign-on (SSO), Directory Sync (SCIM), RBAC, and Audit Logs.

articles.title: → Transparent pricing and a FREE tier of up to 1 million MAUs
articles.summary: WorkOS is trusted by the hottest AI startups: Perplexity, copy.ai, AI21Labs, Jasper, and many others. Deploy enterprise plans today with

articles.title: XAI ENDS DEAL WITH ORACLE, BUILDS OWN AI DATACENTER
articles.summary: xAI has ended its deal with Oracle. It will build its own datacenter after Grok 2 training finishes. The company originally contracted for 24k H100s from Oracle.

articles.title: A16Z IS TRYING TO KEEP AI ALIVE WITH THE OXYGEN INITIATIVE
articles.summary: VC firm Andreessen Horowitz has secured thousands of AI chips, including Nvidia H100 GPUs, to dole out to its AI portfolio companies in exchange for equity.

articles.title: QUORA'S POE NOW LETS USERS CREATE AND SHARE WEB APPS
articles.summary: Quora's Poe has introduced a feature called Previews, enabling users to create interactive apps such as data visualizations and games directly through chatbot interactions.

articles.title: DISTILLING SYSTEM 2 INTO SYSTEM 1
articles.summary: System 2 models are those that use something like Chain of Thought to spend more test time compute and improve reasoning. It turns out that you can distill this behavior into a System 1 model that runs faster with similar accuracy.

articles.title: LEARNING AT TEST TIME
articles.summary: A new RNN variant that outperforms Mamba on a number of tasks. Importantly, the update function is itself an ML model - which enables long contexts and in-context learning.

articles.title: BOOSTING LARGE VISION LANGUAGE MODELS WITH SELF-TRAINING
articles.summary: Video Self-Training with augmented Reasoning (Video-STaR) is a new approach for improving Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs).

articles.title: WHY YOU SHOULD USE A UNIVERSAL SEMANTIC LAYER FOR YOUR SNOWFLAKE DATA
articles.summary: A universal semantic layer makes it much easier to run both BI and AI workloads [12] on your data warehouse. AtScale [12], now available as a Snowflake Native App in the Snowflake Marketplace, allows you to define and consume a universal semantic layer directly within your Snowflake account.

articles.title: See how it works: register for the live session on July 24 →
GRAPHRAG
articles.summary: GraphRAG is a way to explore unstructured text using the power of language models. The quick start runs on Azure, making it easy to spin up.

articles.title: MOBILELLM
articles.summary: MobileLLM optimizes sub-billion parameter language models for on-device use cases.

articles.title: ENHANCING TRAFFIC SIGNAL CONTROL WITH AI
articles.summary: Researchers have developed a new framework that combines a large language model with reinforcement learning to improve traffic signal control systems.

articles.title: TINYGRAD NOTES
articles.summary: Tinygrad is a toolkit for training deep learning models. This set of notes is a great introduction for AI compilers and prepares one for a deep dive into Tinygrad internals.

articles.title: POP CULTURE
articles.summary: Goldman Sachs released a critical 31-page report titled "Gen AI: Too Much Spend, Too Little Benefit?", arguing that generative AI's productivity benefits and returns are significantly limited and that its power demands will drastically increase utility spending. The report highlights doubts about AI's ability to transform industries, pointing out high costs, power grid challenges, and lack of clear productivity gains or significant revenue generation. It suggests a potentially bleak future for the technology without major breakthroughs.

articles.title: THE AI SUMMER
articles.summary: The rapid adoption of ChatGPT, which reached 100 million users in two months, stands in contrast to historical tech developments like the iPhone and e-commerce, which took years to gain traction. Despite the initial hype, many users have not found long-term utility with ChatGPT and enterprise deployment of large language models remains limited, indicating a need for further development to achieve meaningful product-market fit and sustained value.

articles.title: 4D OCCUPANCY GENERATION FOR DRIVING SCENES
articles.summary: OccSora is a diffusion-based 4D occupancy generation model designed to improve long-term temporal evolutions.

articles.title: COMPREHENSIVE AGI SURVEY
articles.summary: This project investigates the journey towards Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), which aims to perform diverse real-world tasks with human-like efficiency.

articles.title: KRUT AI (PRODUCT LAUNCH)
articles.summary: Krut AI is an AI co-pilot built for e-commerce that helps with product shots and content creation.
